title: Dollars and Sex
author: Marshall G. Miller
subline: How economics explains the mating market.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A supply-and-demand chart with HEART as the y-axis and DOLLAR as the x-axis. A red demand curve sweeping upward, an ash supply curve flatlining. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <!-- Y axis -->
    <line x1="-500" y1="-380" x2="-500" y2="280" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- X axis -->
    <line x1="-500" y1="280" x2="500" y2="280" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Axis labels -->
    <text x="-540" y="-380" text-anchor="end" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">DESIRE</text>
    <text x="500" y="320" text-anchor="start" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">PRICE</text>
    <!-- The DEMAND curve (RED) sweeping up: as price falls, desire rises -->
    <path d="M -480 240 Q -200 -200 480 -360" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- The SUPPLY curve (ash) flatlining -->
    <path d="M -480 -100 L 480 -200" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="6 4"/>
    <!-- A small heart glyph at the top-right end of the demand curve -->
    <path d="M 480 -360 Q 460 -380 444 -380 Q 428 -380 428 -362 Q 428 -380 412 -380 Q 396 -380 396 -362 Q 396 -340 428 -320 Q 460 -340 480 -360 Z" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- A dollar-sign glyph at the bottom-left -->
    <text x="-480" y="200" font-size="50" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc" text-anchor="middle">$</text>
    <!-- Curve labels -->
    <g font-size="14" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">
      <text x="-100" y="-100" fill="#fc1c46">DEMAND</text>
      <text x="-200" y="-220" fill="#cccccc">SUPPLY</text>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A supply/demand chart. Y = DESIRE, X = PRICE. The DEMAND curve is RED and rises sharply; the SUPPLY curve is a flat ash line. A heart and dollar sign mark the axes. The cover IS the book's thesis. 320px weight-500 title at the top.
